mapper.insert:
select LPAD((coalesce(MAX(SUBSTRING(doc_no, 1, 5)::INTEGER), 0) + 1)::text, 5, '0') as docNo from esg.tb_safety_duties_doc where write_year = #{writeYear} and doc_type = #{docType}
INSERT INTO esg.tb_safety_duties_doc ( write_year, doc_no, doc_type, comp_id, write_date, title, subtitle, content, created_at, created_by, orgn_role_type, orgn_role_id, dismissal_title, dismissal_subtitle ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, #{docNo}, #{docType}, #{compId}, #{writeDate}, #{title}, #{subtitle}, #{content}, now(), #{createdBy}, #{orgnRoleType}, #{orgnRoleId}, #{dismissalTitle}, #{dismissalSubtitle} )
mapper.update: UPDATE esg.tb_safety_duties_doc SET orgn_role_type = #{orgnRoleType}, orgn_role_id = #{orgnRoleId}, write_date=#{writeDate}, use_yn=#{useYn}, title = #{title}, subtitle =#{subtitle}, content = #{content}, updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy}, dismissal_title = #{dismissalTitle}, dismissal_subtitle = #{dismissalSubtitle} WHERE comp_id = #{compId} AND write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_no = #{docNo}
mapper.insert:
SELECT LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(SUBSTRING(doc_seq, 1, 5)::INTEGER), 0) + 1)::TEXT, 5, '0') AS docSeq FROM esg.tb_safety_duties_doc_user WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_type = #{docType} AND doc_no = #{docNo}
INSERT INTO esg.tb_safety_duties_doc_user( write_year, doc_no, doc_type, doc_seq, use_yn, hr_id, hr_nm, orgn_nm, jbrp_nm, appointment_dt, dismissal_dt, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, #{docNo}, #{docType}, #{docSeq}, #{useYn}, #{hrId}, #{hrNm}, #{orgnNm}, #{jbrpNm}, #{appointmentDt}, #{dismissalDt}, now(), #{createdBy} )
mapper.select: WITH codeList AS( SELECT comp_id, orgn_role_id as id, orgn_role_nm as nm, ord_seq, 'safety' as orgn_role_type FROM esg.tb_safety_health_org_chart_orgn_role WHERE comp_id = #{compId} UNION SELECT comp_id, orgn_role_id as id, orgn_role_nm as nm, ord_seq, 'risk' as orgn_role_type FROM esg.tb_risk_assessment_organ_chart_orgn_role traocor WHERE comp_id = #{compId} UNION SELECT comp_id, minor_cd as id, minor_nm as nm, ord_seq, 'common' as orgn_role_type FROM esg.tb_common_d WHERE major_cd = 'C0025' ) SELECT a.*, b.nm as label FROM esg.tb_safety_duties_doc a LEFT JOIN codeList b ON a.orgn_role_id = b.id AND a.orgn_role_type = b.orgn_role_type WHERE a.comp_id = #{compId} ORDER BY b.orgn_role_type desc, a.use_yn desc, b.ord_seq, a.write_date desc

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT comp_id, orgn_role_id, orgn_role_nm as label, 'safety' as orgn_role_type, ord_seq, use_yn, remark as desc, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by FROM esg.tb_safety_health_org_chart_orgn_role WHERE comp_id = #{compId} AND use_yn = 'Y' UNION ALL SELECT comp_id, orgn_role_id, orgn_role_nm as label, 'risk' as orgn_role_type, ord_seq, use_yn, remark as desc, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by FROM esg.tb_risk_assessment_organ_chart_orgn_role WHERE comp_id = #{compId} AND use_yn = 'Y' ) as test ORDER BY orgn_role_type desc, ord_seq

SELECT tsdd.*, sf.file_id as logoId FROM esg.tb_safety_duties_doc_user tsdd LEFT JOIN esg.tb_sys_file sf ON sf.target_id = tsdd.hr_id AND sf.target_type = 'hrImg' WHERE write_year=#{writeYear} and tsdd.use_yn = 'Y' AND doc_no=#{docNo}

SELECT tsdd.*, sf.file_id as logoId FROM esg.tb_safety_duties_doc_user tsdd LEFT JOIN esg.tb_sys_file sf ON sf.target_id = tsdd.hr_id AND sf.target_type = 'hrImg' WHERE write_year=#{writeYear} AND doc_no=#{docNo}
